abilities.name: Blackstar Cluster Launcher
abilities.text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or KILL TEAM models. Each JUMP PACK, GRAVIS or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION model takes up the space of 3 models.

abilities.name: Auspex Array
abilities.text: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Infernum Halo-launcher
abilities.text: The bearer has the SMOKE keyword.

models.name: Corvus Blackstar

abilities.name: Terminatus Assault
abilities.text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit. Each time this unit ends a Charge move, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that enemy unit does not have the IMPERIUM or CHAOS keywords, subtract 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Teleport Homer
abilities.text: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" of that token and not within 9" of any enemy models. That token is then removed.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a TERMINATOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.text:
If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an INFILTRATOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead. 
If this unit has a Leader unit attached to it during the Declare Battle Formations step, that Leader unit gains the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

abilities.name: Spectrus Doctrines
abilities.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
